video_title: top 5 BEST yt shorts niches in 2026 (to make thousands)
core_promise: The top 5 faceless YouTube Shorts niches for 2026 that can make you thousands of dollars in profit with the highest viral potential, getting hundreds of millions of views, and are beginner-oriented.

workflow_steps.name: Niche Selection
workflow_steps.detail: Identify a niche with high viral potential and ease of content creation. Kellan emphasizes this as the 'most important part' for success.

workflow_steps.name: Content Sourcing (Clips/Memes)
workflow_steps.detail: Find relevant video clips or memes from platforms like TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Reddit, or Twitter. For ranking videos, he specifically recommends TikTok's search engine.

workflow_steps.name: Video Download/Import
workflow_steps.detail: Download selected clips, often without watermarks. For ranking videos, Viblo.ai can download TikTok clips directly by pasting the link.

workflow_steps.name: Initial Editing & Trimming
workflow_steps.detail: Trim clips to their most engaging parts, removing unnecessary intros/outros. This is done within the editing software.

workflow_steps.name: Captioning
workflow_steps.detail: Add 'really engaging captions' to videos to enhance viewer understanding and engagement. Styles vary by niche (e.g., simple text for biker/bodycam, meme text for meme stories, ranking numbers for ranking videos).

workflow_steps.name: Visual Effects & Overlays
workflow_steps.detail: Incorporate editing effects like zoom-ins, arrows, circles, and pop-ups to draw viewer attention to key moments. This is crucial for transformative content.

workflow_steps.name: Voiceover/Commentary
workflow_steps.detail: Record or generate a voiceover to narrate the video, explain memes, or tell a story. Kellan strongly recommends using one's own voice for meme stories and commentary to build authenticity and a brand.

workflow_steps.name: Background Footage (for Meme Stories)
workflow_steps.detail: For meme stories, add background footage, typically Minecraft gameplay, behind the memes.

workflow_steps.name: AI Video Generation (for Skeleton Videos)
workflow_steps.detail: For advanced niches like 'Skeleton Videos,' generate 3D animated footage using AI video generation tools based on a script. This is the most skill-intensive step.

workflow_steps.name: Final Export
workflow_steps.detail: Export the completed video in the appropriate format for YouTube Shorts.

formats_documented.name: Biker / Body Cam Footage
formats_documented.structure: Compilation of real-life bodycam or dashcam footage (e.g., from bikers, security cameras) with engaging captions, editing effects (zoom-ins), and sometimes voiceovers to make it 'transformative' and add value.
formats_documented.notes: Requires significant editing. Can be monetized if transformative. High view potential (e.g., half a billion views on example channel).

formats_documented.name: Ranking Videos
formats_documented.structure: Compilations of short, viral clips (often from TikTok/Instagram) presented in a ranked format (e.g., 'Top 5 Funniest Fails'). Features a clear title, numbered rankings, and simple transitions between clips.
formats_documented.notes: Extremely high view potential (e.g., 56 million views in 11 days). Very simple to create, especially with AI tools like Viblo.ai. Kellan's personal favorite for making money.

formats_documented.name: Meme Stories
formats_documented.structure: Compilations of popular memes (e.g., Twitter screenshots, Reddit posts) displayed on screen, often with a Minecraft gameplay background, and narrated with a voiceover that reads out the memes and adds commentary.
formats_documented.notes: Very high view potential (e.g., 4 billion views on example channel). Voiceover makes it 'entirely original' and 'completely faceless.' Builds a branded channel.

formats_documented.name: Commentary
formats_documented.structure: Takes viral clips, re-edits them with captions, a voiceover that tells a story or provides commentary, and visual cues like arrows and pop-ups to guide viewer attention and make the content engaging and 'transformative'.
formats_documented.example_topic: Mom Taught Daughter A Beautiful Lesson
formats_documented.notes: High RPMs (e.g., 31 cents per 1k engaged views). Kellan personally made over $15k from this niche. Allows for creative style and branding. High view potential (e.g., 5.6 billion views on example channel).

formats_documented.name: Skeleton Videos
formats_documented.structure: 3D animated videos featuring a skeleton character engaging in various activities (e.g., sports, hobbies), with text overlays and voiceovers. The animation itself is AI-generated.
formats_documented.example_topic: What Happens If You Try Playing Madden For 1 Year?
formats_documented.notes: Extremely high viral potential for new channels (e.g., 20k subscribers in 3 weeks). Requires more skill and advanced AI video generation tools. Scripting can be done with ChatGPT.

tools_used.name: Viblo.ai
tools_used.purpose: AI-powered tool for creating faceless content, specifically demonstrated for 'Video Ranking' (downloads clips, adds rankings, trims) and 'Generate AI Videos' (for skeleton video footage). Offers a 7-day free trial.

tools_used.name: CapCut
tools_used.purpose: General video editing for compiling clips, adding captions, effects, and voiceovers. Mentioned as an option for editing complex videos like 'Skeleton Videos'.

tools_used.name: ChatGPT
tools_used.purpose: Used for generating scripts, particularly for 'Skeleton Videos'.

tools_used.name: Google Veo 3.1
tools_used.purpose: State-of-the-art AI video generation model for high-quality visuals, but noted as 'very expensive to generate'.

tools_used.name: Cling
tools_used.purpose: A more cost-effective AI video generation model, accessible through Viblo.ai, for creating footage similar to Google Veo 3.1.

data_sources: AI video generation (e.g., Viblo.ai's 'Generate AI Videos' feature, Cling, Google Veo 3.1)

publishing_strategy.timing: Consistent posting for 3-4 weeks to see results.
publishing_strategy.cross_posting: Not explicitly detailed, but implied content is optimized for YouTube Shorts.
publishing_strategy.monetization_stack: YouTube Partner Program (Shorts Feed ads), affiliate links (mentioned in Skelly Skillz channel description).

growth_hacks: Selecting the right niche is the most important part for success.
Making content 'transformative' by adding value (captions, effects, voiceovers).
Using your own voice for commentary/meme stories for authenticity and branding.
Taking inspiration from currently successful channels in the chosen niche.
Leveraging AI tools to streamline content creation and maintain consistency.
missing_pieces_for_agentic_app: Automated identification and selection of trending/viral clips from various platforms (TikTok, Instagram, Reddit, Twitter).
Advanced AI-driven video re-editing capabilities (automatic zoom-ins, object tracking for arrows/circles, dynamic pop-ups) tailored to specific niche formats.
Contextual AI voiceover generation that matches the tone and storytelling style required for commentary and meme stories, potentially even cloning a user's voice.
Seamless integration of AI-generated background footage (e.g., Minecraft gameplay) or 3D animated characters (like skeletons) with user-provided scripts and voiceovers.
Automated copyright and fair use analysis for sourced content to ensure monetization eligibility.
Automated content scheduling and publishing directly to YouTube Shorts with optimized titles and hashtags.
A robust, cost-effective AI video generation engine that can produce high-quality, diverse visuals on demand for niches like 'Skeleton Videos' without prohibitive costs.
